{{Infobox character
| name = Netherworld Empress
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|bow that transforms into a spear}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Netherworld Empress]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Waybound (novel)|Waybound]]
}}

''See also: [[Netherworld Empress Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Netherworld]] [[Empress]] is a powerful projection or embodiment that represents the ideals of dominance, conquest for order, and absolute rule. Visually, she is characterized by dark hair, violet eyes that possess a stern and commanding quality, and ceremonial attire including a silver crown. She is often depicted on a battlefield amidst death and destruction, wielding both a dark bow and a spear. The entity's form is composed of several specific attributes: the sight of the [[Bow Icon]], the strength of the [[Strength Icon]], the nobility of the [[Crown Icon]], and a reflection of the [[Shadow Icon]] to convey mastery over [[shadow madra]]. While her appearance was originally linked to [[Akura Malice]], the projection eventually takes on a likeness modeled after [[Mercy]]. The [[Empress]] serves as a manifestation of willpower and authority, used to reinforce the user's presence.}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Adorned in elaborate ceremonial robes and a silver crown, the [[Netherworld]] [[Empress]] possesses dark hair and eyes that shine like cruel amethyst stars. She carries a spear at her side and wields a black bow of darkness, utilizing the sight granted by the [[Bow Icon]]. Her physical form embodies the [[Strength Icon]] and the nobility of the [[Crown Icon]], while her spirit reflects the [[Shadow Icon]]. As she flashed behind [[Malice]], her spiritual pressure weighed heavily upon [[Mercy]]. Ultimately, the [[Empress]] served as the true embodiment of [[Malice]]'s ideals.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Netherworld Empress]] has dark hair and eyes that shine like cruel amethyst stars.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25">''Waybound'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Netherworld Empress]] wears a crown of silver and elaborate ceremonial robes.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Netherworld Empress]] wields a black bow of darkness and has a spear at her side.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Netherworld Empress]]'s spiritual pressure weighs [[Mercy]] down.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26">''Waybound'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The spirit of the [[Netherworld Empress]] reflects the [[Shadow Icon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Netherworld Empress]] wears the nobility of the [[Crown Icon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The body of the [[Netherworld Empress]] carries the [[Strength Icon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Netherworld Empress]] has the sight of the [[Bow Icon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Netherworld Empress]] flashed behind [[Malice]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Netherworld Empress]] was the embodiment of [[Malice]]'s ideals.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29">''Waybound'', chapter 29</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Mercy]] can summon a projection of the [[Netherworld Empress]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The projection of the [[Netherworld Empress]] carries a spear and is clothed in black, white, and violet.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Netherworld Empress]] uses a bow that transforms into a spear.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
